text: Standing in front of the R+D showcase, I feel enveloped by an aura of curiosity and anticipation. The bright lights and purposefully designed displays place me in a liminal realm—halfway between the sterile logic of research and the playful possibility of development. I sense the potential for discovery in every detail, and yet I am aware of the artificiality of the setup, making me both observer and participant. The atmosphere encourages contemplation; I find myself drawn into silent reflection about the boundaries between observer and observed, between creation and discovery.
